zh.Brabourne, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特布拉布恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Cruwys於大約1385年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Robert Cruwys20歲，母親Margaret Cornu17歲。她和William Norton至少有2個女兒。她去世於1457年11月20日在英國英格蘭肯特布拉布恩享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特布拉布恩。

zh-hans.Brabourne, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特布拉布恩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Cruwys于大约1385年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Robert Cruwys20岁，母亲Margaret Cornu17岁。她和William Norton至少有2个女儿。她去世于1457年11月20日在英国英格兰肯特布拉布恩享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特布拉布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Cruwys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cruse
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name probably from an unidentified place in Normandy named with Old French crues, crus, creus ‘hollow’. Creuse (in Somme, Picardy) and Cruys-Straëte (formerly in Flanders, now in the French département of Nord), which have the same etymology, are alternative possibilities but seem less likely on geographical and tenurial grounds.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English crus(e) ‘bold, fierce’, although the regular development would be to Crowse (rhyming with house).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Cruwys was born about 1385, in Devon, England, her father, Robert Cruwys, was 20 and her mother, Margaret Cornu, was 17. She had at least 2 daughters with William Norton. She died on 20 November 1457, in Brabourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Brabourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Cruwys est née environ 1385, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Robert Cruwys, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret Cornu, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec William Norton. Elle est décédée le 20 novembre 1457, à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Cruwys um 1385 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Cruwys 20 und ihre Mutter Margaret Cornu 17. Sie hatte mit William Norton mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. November 1457 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Brabourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Brabourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Cruwys è nata il circa 1385 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Robert Cruwys, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Margaret Cornu, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con William Norton. Morì il 20 novembre 1457, nel Brabourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Brabourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Brabourne, Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケントブラボウルン
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cruwysが約1385年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Robert Cruwysは20歳，母Margaret Cornuは17歳であった。彼女はWilliam Nortonとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1457年11月20日にイギリスイギリスケントブラボウルンで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントブラボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cruwys(이)가 대략 1385년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Cruwys(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Cornu(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 William Norton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1457년 11월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 브라보우른에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 브라보우른에 묻혔다.

mn.Brabourne, Kent, England: Brabourne, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Cruwys nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Cruwys, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Cornu, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com William Norton. Ela faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1457, em Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Cruwys родилась около 1385 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Cruwys было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cornu, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от William Norton. Она умерла 20 ноября 1457 г. в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Cruwys nació aproximadamente 1385, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Cruwys, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margaret Cornu, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con William Norton. Murió el 20 de noviembre de 1457, en Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
